name: TTS Voice Module
description: Multi-engine Text-to-Speech module with voice cloning support. Supports OpenAI TTS, Coqui XTTS-v2 (self-hosted), and Web Speech API. React component + custom hooks for easy integration.
run: Copy TTSModule.tsx + useTTS.ts + routes to your Next.js app. See README.

output.name: audio_url
output.description: Audio file URL or data URI

author: Tiranyx
